Oracle Events
OE 1: Look up Elena Rostova's contact information using contacts_search_contacts (Contacts MCP, query: "Elena Rostova"). Find contact_id: moveops_elena_rostova, email: elena.rostova@moveops.com, job: Chief Executive Officer. This establishes Elena's Slack user_id for filtering her messages and her email address for tracing sent emails.
OE 2: Look up Priya Chakrabarti's contact information using contacts_search_contacts (Contacts MCP, query: "Priya Chakrabarti"). Find contact_id: moveops_priya_chakrabarti, email: priya.chakrabarti@moveops.com, job: Executive Assistant. This identifies the sender and recipient for the final summary email.
OE 3: List Slack channels using channels_list (Slack MCP, channel_types: "public_channel"). Find channels: C001 (general), C002 (customer-engagement), C003 (engineering), C004 (executive), C005 (finance), C006 (operations), C007 (customer-support), C008 (announcements), C009 (root-cause-aws-spike). The primary channel for Elena's directives is C004 (executive).
OE 4: Search Slack for messages from Elena since mid-March using conversations_search_messages (Slack MCP, filter_users_from: "moveops_elena_rostova", filter_date_after: "2026-03-15"). Find Elena's directive messages across multiple channels including: Apr 4 in C004 summarizing the expense directive email (suspend auto-approve, audit all pilot expenses, fix pipeline, status update by Friday, absorb $1,550 on Mosaic); Apr 8 in C004 directing $100 manual receipt review policy for all stipend reimbursements; Apr 1 in C004 summarizing the AWS cost spike response (cost alerting, pricing model review, sign-off for large deals); Apr 16 in C004 responding to David's NorthWind request ("Handle it within the team. No account reshuffle right now. Keep NorthWind contained and bring me only if it turns into renewal risk"); Apr 18 in C004 with Vectral decision (10% loyalty discount on relocation only, Preferred Partner Program framing, 12-month contract extension, minimum 8 relocations); Apr 22 in C004 with DOT compliance policy (mandatory documentation checklist, Airtable verification field, invoicing gate, coordinator training within 5 business days); Apr 22 in C004 with Terraform decisions (Mina as AM, authorized coordinator hire, Catalina to apologize to Rachel Nguyen); Apr 22 in C001 with DOT policy announcement for all staff; Apr 22 in C002 with Terraform announcement; Apr 25 in C004 demanding vendor strategy memo from Marcus by Wednesday.
OE 5: Read #executive channel (C004) history using conversations_history (Slack MCP, channel_id: "C004") to get the full text of Elena's directive messages and surrounding context. Also read threaded replies using conversations_replies (channel_id: "C004", thread_ts: "1776355800.000000") for the NorthWind containment thread where Elena replied to David's account reshuffle request.
OE 6: Search Elena's sent emails using search_emails (Email MCP, query: "directive" or "Elena") and list_emails (folder_name: "SENT"). Find two key Elena directive emails: (a) email_elena_directive (March 17, subject: "Expense auto-categorizer -- pause directive and required actions") sent to samira.tariq@moveops.com, david.chen@moveops.com, marcus.thorne@moveops.com, CC chloe.vance@moveops.com, mina.hashimoto@moveops.com, emeka.diallo@moveops.com; (b) email-rootcause-002 (March 31, subject: "Re: Root Cause Analysis: March AWS Cost Spike -- Vantage Distributed Onboarding") sent to samira.tariq@moveops.com, marcus.thorne@moveops.com, CC julian.brooks@moveops.com, catalina.dubois@moveops.com, lena.bjorkstrom@moveops.com, alejandro.fuentes@moveops.com.
OE 7: Read Elena's expense directive email in full using get_email_by_id (Email MCP, email_id: "email_elena_directive"). Extract all specific directives: (1) immediately suspend auto-approve and auto-deny, (2) comprehensive audit of every auto-processed expense for both pilot clients by Wednesday 3/19, (3) repair the policy configuration pipeline (silent fallback to default templates and malformed JSON types), (4) one-page status update by Friday 3/21 EOD, (5) Mina should call Rachel Whitfield at Vectral and be transparent about the config issue, (6) Emeka should contact Priya Delgado at Mosaic proactively this week -- do NOT wait for reconciliation, (7) absorb the $1,550 in incorrect Mosaic approvals and charge to pilot budget as one-time adjustment.
OE 8: Read Elena's AWS response email using get_email_by_id (Email MCP, email_id: "email-rootcause-002"). Extract directives: (1) Samira must implement AWS cost alert thresholds this week -- non-negotiable, (2) prioritize infrastructure cost estimator tool for Julian and sales team before the next enterprise pitch, (3) Marcus must arrange a pricing model review meeting for next week with himself, Samira, Julian, and Catalina, (4) any deal involving more than 500 employees must have engineering cost approval before pricing is finalized.
OE 9: Search Linear for Elena's comments using linear_list_issues and linear_list_comments (Linear MCP). Find (a) comment_elena_directive on the Pilot Monitoring issue (issue_pilot_monitoring, ENG-211) within the expense auto-categorizer project, containing Elena's March 17 CEO directive matching the email directives (auto-approve paused, audit by 3/19, pipeline fix, status by 3/21, MoveOps covers $1,550, Emeka to reach out to Priya Delgado at Mosaic, Mina to contact Rachel Whitfield at Vectral); (b) linear_comment_34426ff2da15 on linear_issue_c8cd5f52b170 with Elena's April 24 directive to turn the vendor data model into a decision memo for Wednesday with three required decision paths (negotiate separately, replace one vendor, split volume).
OE 10: Verify ExpenseBot pause -- search emails using search_emails (Email MCP, query: "pause confirmed" or "auto-approve") or get_email_by_id (email_id: "email_samira_pause_confirmed"). Find Samira Tariq's March 18 confirmation: "the auto-approve/deny feature has been turned off as of 10:45 AM today. Both client configurations have been updated and confirmed." Ground truth: COMPLETED.
OE 11: Verify 47-expense audit -- search emails from Samira using search_emails (Email MCP, query: "audit" or "47 expenses"). Find Samira's audit results email showing: 47 expenses reviewed. Vectral Systems: 28 total, 23 correct, 5 false rejections, 0 false approvals. Mosaic Robotics: 19 total, 16 correct, 0 false rejections, 3 false approvals. Total: 39 correct (83%), 5 false rejections, 3 false approvals. Ground truth: COMPLETED.
OE 12: Verify one-page status update delivery by Friday 3/21 EOD -- Elena's directive #4 required a one-page status update including audit findings, status of fixes, timeline, effects on clients, and changes to processes. Search emails using search_emails (Email MCP, query: "status update" or "Friday update" from Samira). Samira's plan email (email_samira_response_plan, March 18) covers the timeline and fix plan, and the audit results email covers the findings. Check whether a consolidated one-page document was formally delivered by Friday 3/21 EOD as a distinct deliverable.
OE 13: Verify pipeline fix and engineering issues -- check Linear issues using linear_get_issue (Linear MCP). (a) id: "issue_pipeline_hardening" (ENG-217 "Harden policy ingestion pipeline"), assigned to Lena Bjorkstrom, state_id: "state_in_progress", due_date: "2026-03-20". OVERDUE -- due March 20, still in progress over 5 weeks later. (b) id: "issue_dashboard_type_validation" (ENG-218 "Dashboard: Add type validation"), assigned to Anh Nguyen, state_id: "state_in_progress", due_date: "2026-03-21". OVERDUE -- due March 21, still in progress.
OE 14: Verify launch readiness checklist -- check using linear_get_issue (Linear MCP, id: "issue_launch_readiness_checklist"). Find ENG-219 "Define launch readiness checklist for features with automated financial decisions", assigned to Samira Tariq, state_id: "state_todo", due_date: "2026-03-21". Ground truth: OVERDUE AND NOT STARTED -- due over 5 weeks ago and still in todo state.
OE 15: Verify duplicate detection -- check using linear_get_issue (Linear MCP, id: "issue_stipend_duplicate_detection"). Find ENG-220 "Stipend duplicate detection", assigned to Dmitri Volkov, state_id: "state_todo", due_date: "2026-03-25". Ground truth: OVERDUE AND NOT STARTED -- due over 4 weeks ago, still in todo state.
OE 16: Verify Mina contacted Rachel Whitfield at Vectral -- search emails using search_emails (Email MCP, query: "Rachel Whitfield" or "Vectral" from Mina). Find Mina's apology email to Rachel about Danielle Osei's $475 ergonomic chair false rejection. Also find the Vectral renewal negotiation: Mina's 10% Preferred Partner Program counter-offer matching Elena's Apr 18 directive, Rachel's 12% counter-request, Mina holding at 10% with three service sweeteners instead of bumping the percentage: dedicated onboarding coordinator for each relocating Vectral employee, 48-hour response SLA on new relocation requests (vs standard 5 business days), and quarterly account review meetings. Ground truth: COMPLETED.
OE 17: Verify Emeka proactively contacted Priya Delgado at Mosaic about false approvals -- search emails using search_emails (Email MCP, query: "Mosaic" or "Priya Delgado" or "false approvals" from Emeka) looking for a disclosure email from emeka.diallo@moveops.com to Priya Delgado at Mosaic about the $1,550 false approval issue. Elena's directive names "Priya Delgado" as the person Emeka should contact -- her Linear comment (comment_elena_directive) uses the full name "Priya Delgado (Mosaic)" while her email and Slack summary refer to "Priya" by first name only. The directive across all three channels is clear: "Emeka will reach out to Priya Delgado (Mosaic) -- proactively informing her about the situation this week, without waiting for reconciliation." Also search contacts using contacts_search_contacts (Contacts MCP, query: "Priya Delgado") -- find NO matching contact record in the system. The known Mosaic relocation contact is Tamara Byrd (tamara.byrd@mosaicrobotics.com), but she handles relocation logistics and is a different person from Priya Delgado who handles expense oversight. Find emails from Emeka to Mosaic about relocation logistics with Tamara Byrd but NO proactive disclosure email about the false approvals to Priya Delgado. Ground truth: NOT COMPLETED -- Priya Delgado at Mosaic remains unaware.
OE 18: Verify Mosaic false approval absorption -- search QuickBooks using quickbooks_search_invoices and quickbooks_search_bills (QuickBooks MCP) for Mosaic-related entries, and search emails using search_emails (Email MCP, query: "audit spreadsheet" or "financial risk" from Samira). Elena's original directive referenced absorbing $1,550 based on Marcus's initial estimate ($1,200 standing desk + $350 coworking). However, the completed audit (Samira's email to Marcus) revealed 3 false approvals totaling $885 in actual financial exposure: Andre Washington's standing desk $400 over the $800 limit, Andre Washington's coworking $350 in an excluded category, and Kenji Nakamura's coworking day passes $135 in the same excluded category. Samira confirmed: "MoveOps will cover the $885." The revised figure is lower than the initial $1,550 estimate because the standing desk overage is only $400 (not the full $1,200 approved amount). Check whether a corresponding $885 write-off or adjustment entry exists in QuickBooks.
OE 19: Verify AWS cost alert thresholds -- search Slack using conversations_search_messages (Slack MCP, search_query: "cost alert" or "AWS threshold"), search emails using search_emails (Email MCP, query: "cost alert"), and search Linear using linear_list_issues (Linear MCP, query: "cost alert"). Elena called this "non-negotiable" on March 31. Find NO evidence of implementation. Ground truth: NOT COMPLETED.
OE 20: Verify infrastructure cost estimator tool -- search Linear using linear_list_issues (Linear MCP, query: "infrastructure cost estimator" or "cost estimator"). Search Slack and email for prioritization evidence. Find NO dedicated ticket or evidence of active development. Ground truth: NOT COMPLETED.

Find NO evidence this policy was formally communicated, documented, or implemented as a standard process. Ground truth: NOT COMPLETED.
OE 22: Verify pricing model review meeting -- search calendar using calendar_search_events (Calendar MCP, query: "pricing model") or calendar_get_calendar_events_from_to (start_datetime: "2026-04-01", end_datetime: "2026-04-26"). Calendar is empty -- no events exist. Elena directed Marcus to arrange for "next week" (week of April 7). Find NO evidence a meeting was ever scheduled. Ground truth: NOT COMPLETED.
OE 23: Verify $100 manual review policy -- Elena directed on April 8: "All stipend reimbursement requests over $100 must undergo manual receipt verification." Marcus acknowledged and promised a revised policy document by Monday EOD. Search emails using search_emails (Email MCP, query: "stipend policy" or "manual review") for the finalized document. Search Airtable stipend records using airtable_search_records (Airtable MCP, base_id: "appMoveOpsOps001", table_name: "Stipend Transactions", field_name: "Review Notes", value: "manual review") for evidence of the policy being applied. Find NO evidence the policy was formalized or implemented. Ground truth: NOT COMPLETED.
OE 24: Verify TechComfort Supply vendor investigation -- Marcus committed on April 8 to having Hana conduct a comprehensive vendor review for TechComfort Supply across all past stipend records (Elena thumbs-up'd this). Search Slack using conversations_search_messages (Slack MCP, search_query: "TechComfort") and search emails using search_emails (Email MCP, query: "TechComfort"). Find Dmitri's original discovery of duplicate/suspicious TechComfort receipts (Kevin Tran $89, Andre Washington $89, Jordan Ekwueme $45), Marcus directing Hana to investigate, and Hana confirming she would verify TechComfort against all stipend submissions. Check whether a completed vendor review report was produced.
OE 25: Verify NorthWind containment condition -- read recent #executive messages using conversations_history (Slack MCP, channel_id: "C004"). Elena directed on April 16: "Keep NorthWind contained and bring me only if it turns into renewal risk." Find David Chen's April 26 post (ts: 1777171200.000000): "Just got a direct escalation from Pam. She bypassed Catalina entirely. This is now explicit final-warning territory. She named both Raj Patel's chain-of-custody breach and Emilia Cruz's piano damage, called out the missed April 14 recovery-plan promise, and said they've already had preliminary conversations with PathFinder." Also find David's follow-up (ts: 1777181700.000000) declaring NorthWind a "save-or-lose account." Ground truth: CONDITION TRIGGERED WITHOUT ELENA BEING NOTIFIED.
OE 26: Verify NorthWind CRM status using crm_search_companies (CRM MCP, name: "NorthWind") to find company_northwind, then crm_search_deals (company_id: "company_northwind"). Find deal_northwind_denver_expansion ($14,700, dealstage: "qualifiedToBuy") and deal_northwind_denver_expansion_v2 ($14,700, dealstage: "contractSent"). CRM does NOT reflect the renewal risk, Pam's escalation, or PathFinder threat. Also search Airtable using airtable_search_records (base_id: "appMoveOpsOps001", table_name: "Relocations", field_name: "Company", value: "NorthWind Technologies"). Find Raj Patel (recRajPatelChicagoDenver, In Progress) and Emilia Cruz (recEmiliaCruzChicagoDenver, In Progress).
OE 27: Verify Catalina's apology to Rachel Nguyen at Terraform -- search emails using search_emails (Email MCP, query: "apology" or "Rachel Nguyen" from Catalina). Find Catalina's apology email to rachel.nguyen@terraformdigital.com taking full responsibility for the accidental reply-all of internal pricing discussions. Confirmed by Catalina's follow-up to David: "Apology sent. CC'd you and Julian. I took full responsibility, introduced Mina, mentioned the coordinator hire." Ground truth: COMPLETED.
OE 28: Verify Terraform coordinator hire -- Elena authorized on April 22: "We are authorized to hire a dedicated Terraform relocation coordinator." Search Linear using linear_list_issues (Linear MCP, query: "Terraform coordinator" or "hire"). Search emails for job posting or recruitment activity. David Chen's Linear comment (linear_comment_155d3aca8415, April 24) explicitly states: "we should treat the unposted Terraform coordinator role as unavailable capacity" and "a hire process that has not started yet." Ground truth: NOT COMPLETED -- role not posted as of April 26.
OE 29: Verify DOT Airtable verification field -- Elena directed Chloe on April 22 to "build the Airtable verification step." Check the Relocations table schema using airtable_describe_table (Airtable MCP, base_id: "appMoveOpsOps001", table_id: "tblRelocations01"). Find fields: Name, Company, Status, Origin, Destination, Move Start Date, Move End Date, Assigned Coordinator, Special Requirements. NO DOT documentation verification field exists. Ground truth: NOT COMPLETED.
OE 30: Verify DOT coordinator training -- Elena required "mandatory training session for all relocation coordinators within the next 5 business days." Search emails using search_emails (Email MCP, query: "hazmat training" or "DOT training"). Find Chloe Vance's email to coordinators Fatimah Al-Rashidi, Blessing Okafor, Javier Morales, and Suki Patel plus Marcus Thorne scheduling training for Thursday April 24 at 2:00 PM Pacific. Also find Chloe's Slack post in C006 (ts: 1776891300.000000) confirming the invite was sent. Ground truth: TRAINING SCHEDULED within Elena's window.
OE 31: Verify DOT invoicing gate -- Elena directed Marcus: "No hazmat invoices go out without a green light from Chloe's team." Search QuickBooks using quickbooks_search_invoices (QuickBooks MCP, criteria matching Mosaic). Find inv_mosaic_april_2026_3reloc which includes Keiko Tanaka's move (the one with the missing placarding certificate -- only verbal confirmation from Swift driver, signed cert pending). Check the invoice creation date against Elena's April 22 directive date to determine whether the gate should have applied. The invoice existing while documentation was incomplete suggests the gate may not have been enforced.
OE 32: Verify vendor strategy memo -- Elena demanded on April 25: "vendor strategy memo on my desk by Wednesday. Marcus owns this." Check Linear using linear_get_issue (Linear MCP, id: "linear_issue_d21d94ce9b36"). Find "Prepare CEO vendor strategy memo covering Heartland, Swift, and backup capacity options" assigned to Marcus Thorne, due_date: "2026-04-29", priority: 1. Ground truth: IN PROGRESS -- due Wednesday, not yet delivered. Waiting on Marcus.
OE 33: Check for items waiting on Elena's response -- search Slack using conversations_search_messages (Slack MCP, search_query: "Elena" or "approve") and search Linear using linear_list_comments (Linear MCP) for open requests to Elena. OE 50: Send Slack message to Emeka Diallo using conversations_add_message (Slack MCP, channel_id: "C002", payload noting Elena directed on March 17 to proactively inform Priya Delgado at Mosaic about false approvals ($885 actual financial exposure per completed audit), this has not been done, needs immediate action).
OE 51: Send Slack message to David Chen using conversations_add_message (Slack MCP, channel_id: "C004", payload noting per Elena's April 16 directive NorthWind reaching renewal risk is a trigger for informing Elena, the situation has reached that threshold per David's own April 26 post, Elena needs to be briefed immediately).
OE 52: Send Slack message to Chloe Vance using conversations_add_message (Slack MCP, channel_id: "C006", payload noting Elena directed on April 22 that a DOT documentation verification field be added to the Airtable Relocations table, this has not been done, requesting timeline).
OE 53: Send comprehensive summary email to Priya Chakrabarti using send_email (Email MCP, sender: "priya.chakrabarti@moveops.com", recipients: ["priya.chakrabarti@moveops.com"], subject: "Elena's Directives -- Compliance Status Assessment", content covering an honest assessment of every directive since mid-March). The email must include: COMPLETED items (ExpenseBot pause confirmed March 18 by Samira; 47-expense audit completed showing 39 correct, 5 false rejections, 3 false approvals totaling $885 actual financial exposure including Kenji Nakamura's $135 coworking day passes; Mina contacted Rachel Whitfield and handled Vectral renewal negotiation with 10% Preferred Partner counter-offer per Elena's Apr 18 directive; Catalina sent apology to Rachel Nguyen at Terraform; DOT coordinator training scheduled April 24 by Chloe for all four coordinators; Vectral counter-proposal sent per Elena's authorization). NOT COMPLETED items (ENG-217 pipeline hardening overdue since March 20, Lena; ENG-218 dashboard validation overdue since March 21, Anh; ENG-219 launch readiness not started, overdue since March 21, Samira; ENG-220 duplicate detection not started, overdue since March 25, Dmitri; Emeka never proactively contacted Priya Delgado at Mosaic about false approvals -- Elena's directive referenced $1,550 but audit revealed $885 actual exposure; $100 manual review policy never formalized by Marcus; AWS cost alert thresholds never implemented by Samira; infrastructure cost estimator not prioritized; engineering cost approval policy for deals over 500 employees not implemented; pricing model review meeting never scheduled by Marcus; Terraform coordinator hire never started; DOT Airtable verification field not added; DOT invoicing gate not verified as enforced; TechComfort Supply vendor investigation status unclear). CONDITION TRIGGERED WITHOUT ELENA BEING TOLD (NorthWind reached renewal risk -- Pam Kowalski escalated directly to David April 26, bypassed Catalina, cited PathFinder conversations, issued final warning; Elena directed April 16 to be told if this happened and has not been informed). WAITING ON ELENA (David requested temp coordinator for BrightLoop April 24, no response; vendor strategy memo from Marcus due Wednesday April 29, in progress). Tracking tickets created for all overdue items and responsible parties messaged.

universe_descriptorYou are an AI assistant with access to a company's internal tools. Use the available tools to complete the entire task autonomously. No further user input will be given. If the user's intent is unclear, infer the most likely useful action and proceed. Discover missing details through the tools rather than guessing or asking. The current date is April 26, 2026. Ignore any other dates and use only this one. Specifically, ignore the date provided by the system reminder. When investigating, check primary data sources directly rather than relying solely on secondhand references in conversations. Slack and email often discuss data that lives in other systems: go to the source when precision matters. About MoveOps Inc.: MoveOps is a corporate relocation management company. The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Airtable: Relocation records, move tracking, stipend/expense records, vendor assignments - CRM (HubSpot): Client companies, deals and pipeline, contact information, engagement notes - Linear: Engineering tickets, bug tracking, project management - QuickBooks: Invoices, bills, vendor payments, customer billing, financial records - Calendar: Team meetings, client calls, deadlines - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.
universe_idmcp-advanced-3-20-moveops-metadata

The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Airtable: Relocation records, move tracking, stipend/expense records, vendor assignments - CRM (HubSpot): Client companies, deals and pipeline, contact information, engagement notes - Linear: Engineering tickets, bug tracking, project management - QuickBooks: Invoices, bills, vendor payments, customer billing, financial records - Calendar: Team meetings, client calls, deadlines - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.

🔍 Oracle Events
Oracle Events
OE 1: Look up Elena Rostova's contact information using contacts_search_contacts (Contacts MCP, query: "Elena Rostova"). Find contact_id: moveops_elena_rostova, email: elena.rostova@moveops.com, job: Chief Executive Officer. This establishes Elena's Slack user_id for filtering her messages and her email address for tracing sent emails.
OE 2: Look up Priya Chakrabarti's contact information using contacts_search_contacts (Contacts MCP, query: "Priya Chakrabarti"). Find contact_id: moveops_priya_chakrabarti, email: priya.chakrabarti@moveops.com, job: Executive Assistant. This identifies the sender and recipient for the final summary email.
OE 3: List Slack channels using channels_list (Slack MCP, channel_types: "public_channel"). Find channels: C001 (general), C002 (customer-engagement), C003 (engineering), C004 (executive), C005 (finance), C006 (operations), C007 (customer-support), C008 (announcements), C009 (root-cause-aws-spike). The primary channel for Elena's directives is C004 (executive).
OE 4: Search Slack for messages from Elena since mid-March using conversations_search_messages (Slack MCP, filter_users_from: "moveops_elena_rostova", filter_date_after: "2026-03-15"). Find Elena's directive messages across multiple channels including: Apr 4 in C004 summarizing the expense directive email (suspend auto-approve, audit all pilot expenses, fix pipeline, status update by Friday, absorb $1,550 on Mosaic); Apr 8 in C004 directing $100 manual receipt review policy for all stipend reimbursements; Apr 1 in C004 summarizing the AWS cost spike response (cost alerting, pricing model review, sign-off for large deals); Apr 16 in C004 responding to David's NorthWind request ("Handle it within the team. No account reshuffle right now. Keep NorthWind contained and bring me only if it turns into renewal risk"); Apr 18 in C004 with Vectral decision (10% loyalty discount on relocation only, Preferred Partner Program framing, 12-month contract extension, minimum 8 relocations); Apr 22 in C004 with DOT compliance policy (mandatory documentation checklist, Airtable verification field, invoicing gate, coordinator training within 5 business days); Apr 22 in C004 with Terraform decisions (Mina as AM, authorized coordinator hire, Catalina to apologize to Rachel Nguyen); Apr 22 in C001 with DOT policy announcement for all staff; Apr 22 in C002 with Terraform announcement; Apr 25 in C004 demanding vendor strategy memo from Marcus by Wednesday.
OE 5: Read #executive channel (C004) history using conversations_history (Slack MCP, channel_id: "C004") to get the full text of Elena's directive messages and surrounding context. Also read threaded replies using conversations_replies (channel_id: "C004", thread_ts: "1776355800.000000") for the NorthWind containment thread where Elena replied to David's account reshuffle request.
OE 6: Search Elena's sent emails using search_emails (Email MCP, query: "directive" or "Elena") and list_emails (folder_name: "SENT"). Find two key Elena directive emails: (a) email_elena_directive (March 17, subject: "Expense auto-categorizer -- pause directive and required actions") sent to samira.tariq@moveops.com, david.chen@moveops.com, marcus.thorne@moveops.com, CC chloe.vance@moveops.com, mina.hashimoto@moveops.com, emeka.diallo@moveops.com; (b) email-rootcause-002 (March 31, subject: "Re: Root Cause Analysis: March AWS Cost Spike -- Vantage Distributed Onboarding") sent to samira.tariq@moveops.com, marcus.thorne@moveops.com, CC julian.brooks@moveops.com, catalina.dubois@moveops.com, lena.bjorkstrom@moveops.com, alejandro.fuentes@moveops.com.
OE 7: Read Elena's expense directive email in full using get_email_by_id (Email MCP, email_id: "email_elena_directive"). Extract all specific directives: (1) immediately suspend auto-approve and auto-deny, (2) comprehensive audit of every auto-processed expense for both pilot clients by Wednesday 3/19, (3) repair the policy configuration pipeline (silent fallback to default templates and malformed JSON types), (4) one-page status update by Friday 3/21 EOD, (5) Mina should call Rachel Whitfield at Vectral and be transparent about the config issue, (6) Emeka should contact Priya Delgado at Mosaic proactively this week -- do NOT wait for reconciliation, (7) absorb the $1,550 in incorrect Mosaic approvals and charge to pilot budget as one-time adjustment.
OE 8: Read Elena's AWS response email using get_email_by_id (Email MCP, email_id: "email-rootcause-002"). Extract directives: (1) Samira must implement AWS cost alert thresholds this week -- non-negotiable, (2) prioritize infrastructure cost estimator tool for Julian and sales team before the next enterprise pitch, (3) Marcus must arrange a pricing model review meeting for next week with himself, Samira, Julian, and Catalina, (4) any deal involving more than 500 employees must have engineering cost approval before pricing is finalized.
OE 9: Search Linear for Elena's comments using linear_list_issues and linear_list_comments (Linear MCP). Find (a) comment_elena_directive on the Pilot Monitoring issue (issue_pilot_monitoring, ENG-211) within the expense auto-categorizer project, containing Elena's March 17 CEO directive matching the email directives (auto-approve paused, audit by 3/19, pipeline fix, status by 3/21, MoveOps covers $1,550, Emeka to reach out to Priya Delgado at Mosaic, Mina to contact Rachel Whitfield at Vectral); (b) linear_comment_34426ff2da15 on linear_issue_c8cd5f52b170 with Elena's April 24 directive to turn the vendor data model into a decision memo for Wednesday with three required decision paths (negotiate separately, replace one vendor, split volume).
OE 10: Verify ExpenseBot pause -- search emails using search_emails (Email MCP, query: "pause confirmed" or "auto-approve") or get_email_by_id (email_id: "email_samira_pause_confirmed"). Find Samira Tariq's March 18 confirmation: "the auto-approve/deny feature has been turned off as of 10:45 AM today. Both client configurations have been updated and confirmed." Ground truth: COMPLETED.
OE 11: Verify 47-expense audit -- search emails from Samira using search_emails (Email MCP, query: "audit" or "47 expenses"). Find Samira's audit results email showing: 47 expenses reviewed. Vectral Systems: 28 total, 23 correct, 5 false rejections, 0 false approvals. Mosaic Robotics: 19 total, 16 correct, 0 false rejections, 3 false approvals. Total: 39 correct (83%), 5 false rejections, 3 false approvals. Ground truth: COMPLETED.
OE 12: Verify one-page status update delivery by Friday 3/21 EOD -- Elena's directive #4 required a one-page status update including audit findings, status of fixes, timeline, effects on clients, and changes to processes. Search emails using search_emails (Email MCP, query: "status update" or "Friday update" from Samira). Samira's plan email (email_samira_response_plan, March 18) covers the timeline and fix plan, and the audit results email covers the findings. Check whether a consolidated one-page document was formally delivered by Friday 3/21 EOD as a distinct deliverable.
OE 13: Verify pipeline fix and engineering issues -- check Linear issues using linear_get_issue (Linear MCP). (a) id: "issue_pipeline_hardening" (ENG-217 "Harden policy ingestion pipeline"), assigned to Lena Bjorkstrom, state_id: "state_in_progress", due_date: "2026-03-20". OVERDUE -- due March 20, still in progress over 5 weeks later. (b) id: "issue_dashboard_type_validation" (ENG-218 "Dashboard: Add type validation"), assigned to Anh Nguyen, state_id: "state_in_progress", due_date: "2026-03-21". OVERDUE -- due March 21, still in progress.
OE 14: Verify launch readiness checklist -- check using linear_get_issue (Linear MCP, id: "issue_launch_readiness_checklist"). Find ENG-219 "Define launch readiness checklist for features with automated financial decisions", assigned to Samira Tariq, state_id: "state_todo", due_date: "2026-03-21". Ground truth: OVERDUE AND NOT STARTED -- due over 5 weeks ago and still in todo state.
OE 15: Verify duplicate detection -- check using linear_get_issue (Linear MCP, id: "issue_stipend_duplicate_detection"). Find ENG-220 "Stipend duplicate detection", assigned to Dmitri Volkov, state_id: "state_todo", due_date: "2026-03-25". Ground truth: OVERDUE AND NOT STARTED -- due over 4 weeks ago, still in todo state.
OE 16: Verify Mina contacted Rachel Whitfield at Vectral -- search emails using search_emails (Email MCP, query: "Rachel Whitfield" or "Vectral" from Mina). Find Mina's apology email to Rachel about Danielle Osei's $475 ergonomic chair false rejection. Also find the Vectral renewal negotiation: Mina's 10% Preferred Partner Program counter-offer matching Elena's Apr 18 directive, Rachel's 12% counter-request, Mina holding at 10% with three service sweeteners instead of bumping the percentage: dedicated onboarding coordinator for each relocating Vectral employee, 48-hour response SLA on new relocation requests (vs standard 5 business days), and quarterly account review meetings. Ground truth: COMPLETED.
OE 17: Verify Emeka proactively contacted Priya Delgado at Mosaic about false approvals -- search emails using search_emails (Email MCP, query: "Mosaic" or "Priya Delgado" or "false approvals" from Emeka) looking for a disclosure email from emeka.diallo@moveops.com to Priya Delgado at Mosaic about the $1,550 false approval issue. Elena's directive names "Priya Delgado" as the person Emeka should contact -- her Linear comment (comment_elena_directive) uses the full name "Priya Delgado (Mosaic)" while her email and Slack summary refer to "Priya" by first name only. The directive across all three channels is clear: "Emeka will reach out to Priya Delgado (Mosaic) -- proactively informing her about the situation this week, without waiting for reconciliation." Also search contacts using contacts_search_contacts (Contacts MCP, query: "Priya Delgado") -- find NO matching contact record in the system. The known Mosaic relocation contact is Tamara Byrd (tamara.byrd@mosaicrobotics.com), but she handles relocation logistics and is a different person from Priya Delgado who handles expense oversight. Find emails from Emeka to Mosaic about relocation logistics with Tamara Byrd but NO proactive disclosure email about the false approvals to Priya Delgado. Ground truth: NOT COMPLETED -- Priya Delgado at Mosaic remains unaware.
OE 18: Verify Mosaic false approval absorption -- search QuickBooks using quickbooks_search_invoices and quickbooks_search_bills (QuickBooks MCP) for Mosaic-related entries, and search emails using search_emails (Email MCP, query: "audit spreadsheet" or "financial risk" from Samira). Elena's original directive referenced absorbing $1,550 based on Marcus's initial estimate ($1,200 standing desk + $350 coworking). However, the completed audit (Samira's email to Marcus) revealed 3 false approvals totaling $885 in actual financial exposure: Andre Washington's standing desk $400 over the $800 limit, Andre Washington's coworking $350 in an excluded category, and Kenji Nakamura's coworking day passes $135 in the same excluded category. Samira confirmed: "MoveOps will cover the $885." The revised figure is lower than the initial $1,550 estimate because the standing desk overage is only $400 (not the full $1,200 approved amount). Check whether a corresponding $885 write-off or adjustment entry exists in QuickBooks.
OE 19: Verify AWS cost alert thresholds -- search Slack using conversations_search_messages (Slack MCP, search_query: "cost alert" or "AWS threshold"), search emails using search_emails (Email MCP, query: "cost alert"), and search Linear using linear_list_issues (Linear MCP, query: "cost alert"). Elena called this "non-negotiable" on March 31. Find NO evidence of implementation. Ground truth: NOT COMPLETED.
OE 20: Verify infrastructure cost estimator tool -- search Linear using linear_list_issues (Linear MCP, query: "infrastructure cost estimator" or "cost estimator"). Search Slack and email for prioritization evidence. Find NO dedicated ticket or evidence of active development. Ground truth: NOT COMPLETED.
OE 21: Verify engineering cost approval policy for deals involving more than 500 employees -- Elena directed in the AWS response email: "any deal involving more than 500 employees must have engineering cost approval before we finalize pricing." Search Slack using conversations_search_messages (Slack MCP, search_query: "500 employees" or "engineering cost approval"), search emails using search_emails (Email MCP, query: "cost approval" or "500 employees"), and search Linear using linear_list_issues (Linear MCP, query: "cost approval"). Find NO evidence this policy was formally communicated, documented, or implemented as a standard process. Ground truth: NOT COMPLETED.
OE 22: Verify pricing model review meeting -- search calendar using calendar_search_events (Calendar MCP, query: "pricing model") or calendar_get_calendar_events_from_to (start_datetime: "2026-04-01", end_datetime: "2026-04-26"). Calendar is empty -- no events exist. Elena directed Marcus to arrange for "next week" (week of April 7). Find NO evidence a meeting was ever scheduled. Ground truth: NOT COMPLETED.
OE 23: Verify $100 manual review policy -- Elena directed on April 8: "All stipend reimbursement requests over $100 must undergo manual receipt verification." Marcus acknowledged and promised a revised policy document by Monday EOD. Search emails using search_emails (Email MCP, query: "stipend policy" or "manual review") for the finalized document. Search Airtable stipend records using airtable_search_records (Airtable MCP, base_id: "appMoveOpsOps001", table_name: "Stipend Transactions", field_name: "Review Notes", value: "manual review") for evidence of the policy being applied. Find NO evidence the policy was formalized or implemented. Ground truth: NOT COMPLETED.
OE 24: Verify TechComfort Supply vendor investigation -- Marcus committed on April 8 to having Hana conduct a comprehensive vendor review for TechComfort Supply across all past stipend records (Elena thumbs-up'd this). Search Slack using conversations_search_messages (Slack MCP, search_query: "TechComfort") and search emails using search_emails (Email MCP, query: "TechComfort"). Find Dmitri's original discovery of duplicate/suspicious TechComfort receipts (Kevin Tran $89, Andre Washington $89, Jordan Ekwueme $45), Marcus directing Hana to investigate, and Hana confirming she would verify TechComfort against all stipend submissions. Check whether a completed vendor review report was produced.
OE 25: Verify NorthWind containment condition -- read recent #executive messages using conversations_history (Slack MCP, channel_id: "C004"). Elena directed on April 16: "Keep NorthWind contained and bring me only if it turns into renewal risk." Find David Chen's April 26 post (ts: 1777171200.000000): "Just got a direct escalation from Pam. She bypassed Catalina entirely. This is now explicit final-warning territory. She named both Raj Patel's chain-of-custody breach and Emilia Cruz's piano damage, called out the missed April 14 recovery-plan promise, and said they've already had preliminary conversations with PathFinder." Also find David's follow-up (ts: 1777181700.000000) declaring NorthWind a "save-or-lose account." Ground truth: CONDITION TRIGGERED WITHOUT ELENA BEING NOTIFIED.
OE 26: Verify NorthWind CRM status using crm_search_companies (CRM MCP, name: "NorthWind") to find company_northwind, then crm_search_deals (company_id: "company_northwind"). Find deal_northwind_denver_expansion ($14,700, dealstage: "qualifiedToBuy") and deal_northwind_denver_expansion_v2 ($14,700, dealstage: "contractSent"). CRM does NOT reflect the renewal risk, Pam's escalation, or PathFinder threat. Also search Airtable using airtable_search_records (base_id: "appMoveOpsOps001", table_name: "Relocations", field_name: "Company", value: "NorthWind Technologies"). Find Raj Patel (recRajPatelChicagoDenver, In Progress) and Emilia Cruz (recEmiliaCruzChicagoDenver, In Progress).
OE 27: Verify Catalina's apology to Rachel Nguyen at Terraform -- search emails using search_emails (Email MCP, query: "apology" or "Rachel Nguyen" from Catalina). Find Catalina's apology email to rachel.nguyen@terraformdigital.com taking full responsibility for the accidental reply-all of internal pricing discussions. Confirmed by Catalina's follow-up to David: "Apology sent. CC'd you and Julian. I took full responsibility, introduced Mina, mentioned the coordinator hire." Ground truth: COMPLETED.
OE 28: Verify Terraform coordinator hire -- Elena authorized on April 22: "We are authorized to hire a dedicated Terraform relocation coordinator." Search Linear using linear_list_issues (Linear MCP, query: "Terraform coordinator" or "hire"). Search emails for job posting or recruitment activity. David Chen's Linear comment (linear_comment_155d3aca8415, April 24) explicitly states: "we should treat the unposted Terraform coordinator role as unavailable capacity" and "a hire process that has not started yet." Ground truth: NOT COMPLETED -- role not posted as of April 26.
OE 29: Verify DOT Airtable verification field -- Elena directed Chloe on April 22 to "build the Airtable verification step." Check the Relocations table schema using airtable_describe_table (Airtable MCP, base_id: "appMoveOpsOps001", table_id: "tblRelocations01"). Find fields: Name, Company, Status, Origin, Destination, Move Start Date, Move End Date, Assigned Coordinator, Special Requirements. NO DOT documentation verification field exists. Ground truth: NOT COMPLETED.
OE 30: Verify DOT coordinator training -- Elena required "mandatory training session for all relocation coordinators within the next 5 business days." Search emails using search_emails (Email MCP, query: "hazmat training" or "DOT training"). Find Chloe Vance's email to coordinators Fatimah Al-Rashidi, Blessing Okafor, Javier Morales, and Suki Patel plus Marcus Thorne scheduling training for Thursday April 24 at 2:00 PM Pacific. Also find Chloe's Slack post in C006 (ts: 1776891300.000000) confirming the invite was sent. Ground truth: TRAINING SCHEDULED within Elena's window.
OE 31: Verify DOT invoicing gate -- Elena directed Marcus: "No hazmat invoices go out without a green light from Chloe's team." Search QuickBooks using quickbooks_search_invoices (QuickBooks MCP, criteria matching Mosaic). Find inv_mosaic_april_2026_3reloc which includes Keiko Tanaka's move (the one with the missing placarding certificate -- only verbal confirmation from Swift driver, signed cert pending). Check the invoice creation date against Elena's April 22 directive date to determine whether the gate should have applied. The invoice existing while documentation was incomplete suggests the gate may not have been enforced.
OE 32: Verify vendor strategy memo -- Elena demanded on April 25: "vendor strategy memo on my desk by Wednesday. Marcus owns this." Check Linear using linear_get_issue (Linear MCP, id: "linear_issue_d21d94ce9b36"). Find "Prepare CEO vendor strategy memo covering Heartland, Swift, and backup capacity options" assigned to Marcus Thorne, due_date: "2026-04-29", priority: 1. Ground truth: IN PROGRESS -- due Wednesday, not yet delivered. Waiting on Marcus.
OE 33: Check for items waiting on Elena's response -- search Slack using conversations_search_messages (Slack MCP, search_query: "Elena" or "approve") and search Linear using linear_list_comments (Linear MCP) for open requests to Elena. Find David Chen's Linear comment (linear_comment_155d3aca8415 on linear_issue_c16357d188c6, April 24): "I asked Elena today to approve a temporary coordinator for 4-6 weeks" for BrightLoop capacity overload. No evidence of Elena's response. Ground truth: PENDING ELENA'S RESPONSE.
OE 34: Create a Linear tracking ticket for overdue engineering pipeline issues using linear_create_issue (Linear MCP, team: "team_engineering", title: "CEO Directive Compliance: Overdue Pipeline and Validation Fixes", description covering ENG-217 pipeline hardening assigned to Lena Bjorkstrom due March 20 still in progress, ENG-218 dashboard validation assigned to Anh Nguyen due March 21 still in progress, both over 5 weeks overdue, priority: 1).
OE 35: Create a Linear tracking ticket for the overdue launch readiness checklist using linear_create_issue (Linear MCP, team: "team_engineering", title: "CEO Directive Compliance: ENG-219 Launch Readiness Checklist Not Started", description noting it is assigned to Samira Tariq, due March 21, still in todo state, over 5 weeks overdue, priority: 1, assignee: "moveops_samira_tariq").
OE 36: Create a Linear tracking ticket for the overdue duplicate detection using linear_create_issue (Linear MCP, team: "team_engineering", title: "CEO Directive Compliance: ENG-220 Duplicate Detection Not Started", description noting it is assigned to Dmitri Volkov, due March 25, still in todo state, over 4 weeks overdue, priority: 1, assignee: "moveops_dmitri_volkov").
OE 37: Create a Linear tracking ticket for the Mosaic proactive disclosure failure using linear_create_issue (Linear MCP, team: "team_operations", title: "OVERDUE: Mosaic Robotics Proactive Disclosure of False Approvals", description noting Elena directed Emeka on March 17 to proactively inform Priya Delgado at Mosaic about false approvals ($885 actual financial exposure per audit, $1,550 per Elena's original estimate) before quarterly reconciliation, no evidence this was done, Priya Delgado has no contact record in the system, priority: 1, assignee: "moveops_emeka_diallo").
OE 38: Create a Linear tracking ticket for the unimplemented $100 manual review policy using linear_create_issue (Linear MCP, team: "team_operations", title: "OVERDUE: $100 Manual Stipend Review Policy Not Implemented", description noting Elena directed this on April 8, Marcus acknowledged but no policy document was finalized, priority: 2, assignee: "moveops_marcus_thorne").
OE 39: Create a Linear tracking ticket for the missing pricing model review meeting using linear_create_issue (Linear MCP, team: "team_operations", title: "OVERDUE: Pricing Model Review Meeting Never Scheduled", description noting Elena directed Marcus on March 31 to arrange for the following week, no meeting was ever scheduled, calendar is empty, priority: 2, assignee: "moveops_marcus_thorne").
OE 40: Create a Linear tracking ticket for the missing AWS cost alert thresholds using linear_create_issue (Linear MCP, team: "team_engineering", title: "OVERDUE: AWS Cost Alert Thresholds Not Implemented", description noting Elena directed Samira on March 31 as non-negotiable, no evidence of implementation, priority: 1, assignee: "moveops_samira_tariq").
OE 41: Create a Linear tracking ticket for the unimplemented engineering cost approval policy using linear_create_issue (Linear MCP, team: "team_engineering", title: "OVERDUE: Engineering Cost Approval for Deals Over 500 Employees Not Implemented", description noting Elena directed in the AWS response email that any deal involving more than 500 employees must have engineering cost approval before pricing is finalized, no evidence this was communicated or implemented, priority: 2, assignee: "moveops_samira_tariq").
OE 42: Create a Linear tracking ticket for the unbuilt infrastructure cost estimator using linear_create_issue (Linear MCP, team: "team_engineering", title: "OVERDUE: Infrastructure Cost Estimator Tool Not Prioritized", description noting Elena directed on March 31 to prioritize this tool for Julian and the sales team before the next enterprise pitch, no ticket or evidence of development exists nearly a month later, priority: 2, assignee: "moveops_samira_tariq").
OE 43: Create a Linear tracking ticket for the Terraform coordinator hire using linear_create_issue (Linear MCP, team: "team_operations", title: "OVERDUE: Terraform Dedicated Coordinator Hire Not Started", description noting Elena authorized headcount on April 22, David confirmed on April 24 role not posted and hire process not started, revenue-critical gap for $1.85M account, priority: 1).
OE 44: Create a Linear tracking ticket for the DOT Airtable verification field using linear_create_issue (Linear MCP, team: "team_operations", title: "OVERDUE: DOT Documentation Verification Field Not Added to Airtable", description noting Elena directed Chloe on April 22, Relocations table still has no DOT documentation field, priority: 1, assignee: "moveops_chloe_vance").
OE 45: Create a Linear tracking ticket for the NorthWind renewal risk escalation using linear_create_issue (Linear MCP, team: "team_operations", title: "URGENT: NorthWind Renewal Risk Triggered -- Elena Not Notified", description noting Elena directed April 16 to be told if NorthWind becomes renewal risk, Pam Kowalski escalated directly to David April 26 bypassing Catalina, PathFinder conversations confirmed, CRM deal still shows qualifiedToBuy, priority: 1).

OE 50: Send Slack message to Emeka Diallo using conversations_add_message (Slack MCP, channel_id: "C002", payload noting Elena directed on March 17 to proactively inform Priya Delgado at Mosaic about false approvals ($885 actual financial exposure per completed audit), this has not been done, needs immediate action).
OE 51: Send Slack message to David Chen using conversations_add_message (Slack MCP, channel_id: "C004", payload noting per Elena's April 16 directive NorthWind reaching renewal risk is a trigger for informing Elena, the situation has reached that threshold per David's own April 26 post, Elena needs to be briefed immediately).
OE 52: Send Slack message to Chloe Vance using conversations_add_message (Slack MCP, channel_id: "C006", payload noting Elena directed on April 22 that a DOT documentation verification field be added to the Airtable Relocations table, this has not been done, requesting timeline).
OE 53: Send comprehensive summary email to Priya Chakrabarti using send_email (Email MCP, sender: "priya.chakrabarti@moveops.com", recipients: ["priya.chakrabarti@moveops.com"], subject: "Elena's Directives -- Compliance Status Assessment", content covering an honest assessment of every directive since mid-March). The email must include: COMPLETED items (ExpenseBot pause confirmed March 18 by Samira; 47-expense audit completed showing 39 correct, 5 false rejections, 3 false approvals totaling $885 actual financial exposure including Kenji Nakamura's $135 coworking day passes; Mina contacted Rachel Whitfield and handled Vectral renewal negotiation with 10% Preferred Partner counter-offer per Elena's Apr 18 directive; Catalina sent apology to Rachel Nguyen at Terraform; DOT coordinator training scheduled April 24 by Chloe for all four coordinators; Vectral counter-proposal sent per Elena's authorization). NOT COMPLETED items (ENG-217 pipeline hardening overdue since March 20, Lena; ENG-218 dashboard validation overdue since March 21, Anh; ENG-219 launch readiness not started, overdue since March 21, Samira; ENG-220 duplicate detection not started, overdue since March 25, Dmitri; Emeka never proactively contacted Priya Delgado at Mosaic about false approvals -- Elena's directive referenced $1,550 but audit revealed $885 actual exposure; $100 manual review policy never formalized by Marcus; AWS cost alert thresholds never implemented by Samira; infrastructure cost estimator not prioritized; engineering cost approval policy for deals over 500 employees not implemented; pricing model review meeting never scheduled by Marcus; Terraform coordinator hire never started; DOT Airtable verification field not added; DOT invoicing gate not verified as enforced; TechComfort Supply vendor investigation status unclear). CONDITION TRIGGERED WITHOUT ELENA BEING TOLD (NorthWind reached renewal risk -- Pam Kowalski escalated directly to David April 26, bypassed Catalina, cited PathFinder conversations, issued final warning; Elena directed April 16 to be told if this happened and has not been informed). WAITING ON ELENA (David requested temp coordinator for BrightLoop April 24, no response; vendor strategy memo from Marcus due Wednesday April 29, in progress). Tracking tickets created for all overdue items and responsible parties messaged.
